headline: How The Ross Stores ROST Story Is Shifting After A Clean Q4 Beat And New Targets
summary: Analysts now place Ross Stores price targets mainly in the low to mid US$230s to US$240s range, with some reaching toward about US$250, while one valuation model holds a fair value estimate of US$229.81 per share. These updated targets reflect a blend of enthusiasm around a clean Q4 earnings beat, steady execution across the business, and ongoing debate between bullish and more cautious research views. As you read on, you will see how this mixed but constructive narrative is taking shape and...
